if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchCondition != null and searchCondition != ''

choose.otherwise: AND ( m.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR m.COMPANY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BIZ_REG_NO, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_TEL_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.ZIP_CODE AS POSTCODE, m.ADDR1 AS ADDRESS, m.ADDR2 AS ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE_CD AS MEMBER_GRADE, mg.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.JOIN_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, /* m.AGREE_YN 컬럼 없음 → 필요하면 나중에 파생 컬럼으로 추가 */ NULL AS AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND mt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'MEMBER_TYPE' AND mt.CODE_ID = 'MEMBER_ROLE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.JOIN_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND st.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' AND st.CODE_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mg ON m.MEMBER_GRADE_CD = mg.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND mg.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND mg.CODE_ID = 'MEMBER_GRADE'
ORDER BY m.JOIN_DT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BIZ_REG_NO, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_TEL_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.ZIP_CODE AS POSTCODE, m.ADDR1 AS ADDRESS, m.ADDR2 AS ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE_CD AS MEMBER_GRADE, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.JOIN_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, NULL AS AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND mt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'MEMBER_TYPE' AND mt.CODE_ID = 'MEMBER_ROLE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.JOIN_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND st.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' AND st.CODE_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{value}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BIZ_REG_NO, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_TEL_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.ZIP_CODE AS POSTCODE, m.ADDR1 AS ADDRESS, m.ADDR2 AS ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE_CD AS MEMBER_GRADE, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.JOIN_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, NULL AS AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND mt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'MEMBER_TYPE' AND mt.CODE_ID = 'MEMBER_ROLE' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.JOIN_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE_ID AND st.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' AND st.CODE_ID = 'JOIN_STATUS' WHERE m.LOGIN_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER ( MEMBER_TYPE_CD, LOGIN_ID, LOGIN_PWD, COMPANY_NAME, BIZ_REG_NO, CEO_NAME, CEO_MOBILE_NO, EMAIL, COMPANY_TEL_NO, ZIP_CODE, ADDR1, ADDR2, JOIN_STATUS_CD, MEMBER_GRADE_CD, JOIN_DT, USE_YN, REG_ID ) VALUES ( #{memberType}, -- 회원타입 #{memberId}, -- 로그인 아이디 #{loginPw}, -- 비밀번호(암호화 전/후는 서비스단에서 처리) #{companyName}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{contactNumber}, #{email}, #{companyPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{status}, -- 가입상태 코드 #{memberGrade}, -- 회원등급 코드 #{joinDate}, -- 가입일자 (컨트롤러에서 default today 세팅) 'Y', -- USE_YN 'SYSTEM' -- REG_ID (로그인한 관리자 ID로 바꾸고 싶으면 여기만 변경) )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET MEMBER_TYPE_CD = #{memberType}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName}, BIZ_REG_NO = #{businessNumber}, CEO_NAME = #{ceoName}, CEO_MOBILE_NO = #{contactNumber}, EMAIL = #{email}, COMPANY_TEL_NO = #{companyPhone}, ZIP_CODE = #{postcode}, ADDR1 = #{address}, ADDR2 = #{addressDetail}, JOIN_STATUS_CD = #{status}, MEMBER_GRADE_CD = #{memberGrade}, MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM', MOD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER_CREDIT ( MEMBER_ID, MEAT_MONEY, CREDIT_LIMIT, CREDIT_BALANCE, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, -- 위 insertMember에서 생성된 PK #{meatMoney}, -- 0L으로 기본 세팅됨 (컨트롤러에서) #{creditLimit}, -- 0L으로 기본 세팅됨 (컨트롤러에서) #{creditLimit}, -- 초기 잔액 = 한도 'Y', 'SYSTEM', -- REG_ID CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'SYSTEM', -- MOD_ID CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER_AGREE ( MEMBER_ID, AGREE_TYPE_CD, AGREE_YN, AGREE_DT, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, -- Long or String, 실제 MEMBER_ID PK #{agreeTypeCd}, -- 'MARKETING' 또는 'SMS' #{agreeYn}, -- 'Y' / 'N' #{agreeDt}, -- 동의일자(java.time.LocalDate → String 변환해서 넘기거나, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 써도 됨) 'Y', 'SYSTEM', -- REG_ID CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'SYSTEM', -- MOD_ID CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS memberNo, m.LOGIN_ID AS memberId, m.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, m.CEO_NAME AS ceoName FROM TB_MEMBER m WHERE m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = 'ROLE_SELLER' ORDER BY m.COMPANY_NAME
